description_long: This shotgun features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly brown and blue color scheme accented by white and orange details. The body is constructed with angular, geometric lines and a robust frame, including a thumbhole stock for ergonomic handling. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with visible ribbing and a vented section near the muzzle, suggesting enhanced heat dissipation. The receiver area is detailed with mechanical components and a prominent pump mechanism beneath the barrel. The trigger guard is squared and elongated, providing ample space for gloved fingers. Overall, the shotgun appears to be built for durability and functionality in urban environments.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a brown, blue, and white color scheme, featuring a thumbhole stock, long ribbed barrel, and squared trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow muzzle, ribbed barrel, and the alignment of the pump mechanism beneath the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, the thumbhole stock, and the detailed receiver with visible pump and mechanical parts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock's thumbhole design and the compact, angular butt end of the shotgun.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same structural features as view 1, with clear visibility of the pump and stock geometry.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with visible ribbing and venting along the top, extended barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared and elongated trigger guard with a robust, angular profile
